title: potentilla arenaria f. pusilla
intro: Potentilla arenaria f. pusilla, also known as dwarf potentilla or small cinquefoil, is a low-growing perennial plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are believed to aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla arenaria f. pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in infusions and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
